cellestial.single.base.base
===========================

.. py:module:: cellestial.single.base.base


Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   cellestial.single.base.base.plot


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: plot(data: anndata.AnnData, mapping: lets_plot.plot.core.FeatureSpec | None = None, *, axis: Literal[0, 1] | None = None, variable_keys: collections.abc.Sequence[str] | None = None, observations_name: str = 'Barcode', variables_name: str = 'Variable', include_dimensions: bool | int = False) -> lets_plot.plot.core.PlotSpec

   Base plot (for plots without data wrangling).

   :param data: The AnnData object of the single cell data.
   :type data: AnnData
   :param mapping: Aesthetic mappings for the plot, the result of `aes()`.
   :type mapping: FeatureSpec | None, default=None
   :param axis: axis of the data, 0 for observations and 1 for variables.
   :type axis: Literal[0,1] | None, default=None
   :param variable_keys: Variable keys to add to the DataFrame. If None, no additional keys are added.
   :type variable_keys: str | Sequence[str] | None
   :param observations_name: The name of the observations column, default is "barcode".
   :type observations_name: str
   :param variables_name: Name for the variables index column, default is 'variable'
   :type variables_name: str
   :param include_dimensions: Whether to include dimensions in the DataFrame.
                              Providing an integer will limit the number of dimensions to given number.
   :type include_dimensions: bool | int, default=False

   :returns: Base ggplot object.
   :rtype: PlotSpec
